form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th on April 1 over 401m at this track behind Frankly beaten 7 lengths (23.29) in a Grade 5. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th on April 1 over 401m at this track behind Frankly beaten 7 lengths (23.29) in a Grade 5. Leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 340m at Bulli in a handy (19.57), beating Major Ted. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 340m at Bulli in a handy (19.57), beating Major Ted. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fifth (19.68) at Bulli over 340m. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fifth (19.68) at Bulli over 340m. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

form.formComment: Won again and recorded an impressive time after running them ragged to make it two in a row at Gosford over 388m (22.27). Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won again and recorded an impressive time after running them ragged to make it two in a row at Gosford over 388m (22.27). Has the ability and looks a key chance again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: In the home straight shifted in and came together.

form.formComment: Strong performance to score by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a hot 22.58 for the 401m trip. Harder here but warrants respect on latest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to score by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a hot 22.58 for the 401m trip. Harder here but warrants respect on latest.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (22.33) at Gosford, making it two placings on end. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (22.33) at Gosford, making it two placings on end. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Having her first run at this track. Comes off an average run last start over 365m at Nowra when fifth behind El Condor Pasa (21.21) in Grade 5. Likely to find this too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having her first run at this track. Comes off an average run last start over 365m at Nowra when fifth behind El Condor Pasa (21.21) in Grade 5. Likely to find this too tough.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 4th on April 6 over 365m at Nowra behind Out Express beaten 3.5 lengths (21.25) in a Grade 5. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished 4th on April 6 over 365m at Nowra behind Out Express beaten 3.5 lengths (21.25) in a Grade 5. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th on February 25 over 320m at this track behind Suddenly I See beaten 8 lengths (19.07) in a Maiden. Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th on February 25 over 320m at this track behind Suddenly I See beaten 8 lengths (19.07) in a Maiden. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (18.92) over 320m at this track. Can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage eighth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (18.92) over 320m at this track. Can measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the start came up with the lids and was slow to begin.
Began to yield ground at the 150m mark.
